source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In right triangle $ABC$, $M$ and $N$ are midpoints of legs $\overline{AB}$ and $\overline{BC}$, respectively. Leg $\overline{AB}$ is 6 units long, and leg $\overline{BC}$ is 8 units long. How many square units are in the area of $\triangle APC$? <image1>
